Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Tom Holland always forgets about cinco de mayo until I remind him.
Tom Holland always forgets about Cinco de Mayo until I remind him.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Staring intently, the kittens watched Goku pull a handful of treats out of his Winter jacket.
Staring intently, the kittens watched Goku pull a handful of treats out of his winter jacket.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Daniel Kaluuya wrote an article for the summer 2012 issue of the magazine.
Daniel Kaluuya wrote an article for the Summer 2012 issue of the magazine.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Oddly, all of Mysterio's Winter clothes seem to have gone missing.
Oddly, all of Mysterio's winter clothes seem to have gone missing.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
When Imelda got tickets to a Major League Baseball spring Training Game, she canceled all her other plans.
When Imelda got tickets to a Major League Baseball Spring Training game, she canceled all her other plans.

Click to fix any capitalization errors below. Click "Submit Answer" if there are none.
Harley Quinn needs another day to finish packing for the trip.
Harley Quinn needs another day to finish packing for the trip. (There are no capitalization errors).

Last Tuesday, Spider-Man won the seed-spitting contest at the state fair.

Captain Marvel is already much better at juggling than she was when she started practicing in May.
